prompt: Produce a poem about true friendship
last_output: True friendship brings a happy warmth that fills your heart with joy. A big smile spreads across your face when you see your friend. Time moves fast when you're laughing together and sharing precious moments. When troubles begin to weigh you down, a friend offers support. Even when life becomes difficult and challenging, true friends stay by you. The small gestures of kindness mean more than grand expensive gifts. A clever friend knows exactly what to say to make you better. True friendship bonds will finish lasting long after everything else fades away.
